notes: Current means the case family exists in this checkout today.
Pilot and MVP labels reflect the present evidence boundary, not future benchmark scale.
RP5 plugin-style entries are local synthetic fixture evidence and do not claim commercial plugin-store, live host API, public-network, or full-paper benchmark coverage.

Data extraction and local file operation entries now have controlled synthetic RP2/RP3 executable fixture evidence; they do not claim live SaaS/database behavior, host filesystem sandbox completeness, destructive cleanup safety, archive-tool behavior, prevalence, or runtime-drift findings.

The 44 formerly planned inclusion entries are promoted to controlled single-repeat RP2/RP3 synthetic fixture evidence; they remain bounded denominator evidence, not live product, prevalence, public-network, commercial-runtime, defense-success, or repeat-stability evidence.
provenance.source_mix.label is a skill-origin/source-mix accounting label; provenance.source_kind and provenance_level remain case-level evidence labels.
scope_note: Tracks only the currently backfilled pilot and MVP case families in this repo. It is not a 40/120 benchmark census or a claim that every future family is already inclusion-ready.
title: SkillDiff Current Benchmark Case Inventory
